page_content:
KNES180 Volleyball (1 Credit)

This course is intended for students with some volleyball experience. It will provide students with a comprehensive overview of the sport by integrating volleyball skills and tactics with a historical/sociocultural appreciation and value of the sport and its function or benefit in the greater sport world. Students will learn the rules and etiquette of volleyball, and implement their understandings in a series of skill

& formation practices or tests, written assignment or exam, and tournament activities.

Restriction: Must be in a major within the SPHL-Kinesiology department. Credit Only Granted for. KNES180 or KNES160N.
